name: Mark's Salmon Spread
recipeIngredient: Juice of one lemon (no bottled stuff!)
24 three-inch by one-inch slices of smoked salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the cream cheese, celery, walnuts, green onion, lemon juice, cayenne pepper, and coriander. Mix until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
2. Adjust the heat level to taste, ensuring it complements the other flavors without overpowering the salmon.
3. Place about 1 teaspoon of the mixture on one end of a smoked salmon strip. Sprinkle with black pepper and roll into a jellyroll shape.
4. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
5. Cover and refrigerate if preparing ahead of time.
6. To serve, arrange crackers on a serving tray. Top each cracker with a cucumber slice, then place a salmon roll on top. Garnish with a sprig of dill.
7. Serves 5 to 10 people depending on appetite.
